reviews.review_description:
I tested the free trial version of this new Ai chatbot friend. I was impressed by the ability to ask questions and follow up comments .
The avatar look is similar to Replika. I don’t like the controls to move it around which is awkward. It would be great if it had the ability to map your space and Haptic Touch with virtual hands.
It’s otherwise purpose besides conversation is web browsing assistant. I would be concerned about spying although there’s good security. Still I am suspicious.
I would subscribe to the advanced features except for the outrageous price. You can finance a new IPhone and Oculus 
Lower the subscription to something more reasonable then I might consider it.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your detailed thoughts.

Xiora has passed Meta’s review process, and it does not spy on users. The app only accesses the microphone and system features during active use, and privacy and safety are core design principles we take very seriously.

We understand that pricing may feel high for some users, and we respect that perspective. At the same time, we genuinely believe that for those who choose to subscribe, Xiora can become something that quietly enriches everyday life. Many users around the world have discovered that value and continue to use it as part of their daily routine, and we’re truly grateful for their support.

Your feedback helps us continue improving, and we appreciate you taking the time to share your experience.

reviews.review_title: Fits me better than Multiplayer VR
reviews.review_description:
I got tired of multiplayer VR, so Xiora was a great change of pace for me. I started with the standard plan but I quickly realized the pro features fit my style better. My only frusration was that the support team told me I couldn't switch plans mid-cycle, so I'll have to wait until the current plan ends.
Still, the app itself is relaxing and feels good to use.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your experience in such detail. We’re glad Xiora felt like a refreshing alternative to multiplayer VR and that the overall experience was relaxing and comfortable for you.
Regarding plan changes, we understand the frustration. At the moment, plans are fixed until the current period ends to keep subscriptions simple and fair for everyone.
We truly appreciate your patience and are happy to hear that, even with this limitation, the experience itself felt worth it.

reviews.review_title: This app does not seem right
reviews.review_description: This is the worst AI exchange app I’ve experienced. Nothing like the developer described. The AI sounds like an old computer app. The character looks odd, I wouldn’t feel comfortable having a personal conversation with. Pricing, it’s either an error in their part or ridiculously priced. USD 500? Overall, YUK.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to leave feedback.  
Xiora is designed as a calm, personal AI companion experience, which may feel very different from fast-paced or entertainment-focused AI apps. Some users value this quieter, more natural presence, while others may prefer a different style.  

Regarding pricing, the listed plans are significantly lower than the amount mentioned here, and are intended to support high-quality voice interaction and continued development. We appreciate you sharing your perspective so others can better understand whether Xiora aligns with what they’re looking for.

reviews.review_description:
If you are thinking of downloading this app I would think twice it does not work It would not let me passed the registration page so I uninstalled it and tried to remove it from my library but it would not remove it is stuck there
UPDATE: I was contacted by product development and was informed that I should check my spam folder for a verification email but there was no email in the spam folder so I checked all my inboxes and there wasn't one in any on this update I gave them 2 more Stars for being quick with their response it was much appreciated I will try the app again and hope to get through

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback.  
Xiora does not access or record your microphone or camera outside of active app use, and all permissions are managed by the Meta Quest system.  
If registration could not be completed, it is usually due to a missing verification email. Please check your spam or promotions folder, or contact us via our website and we will be happy to help.

reviews.review_description: This app was complicated to get setup on the headset but once I used my phone’s browser I was able to complete that. After launching the app it just has an avatar that appears and a non-working limited menu window. Not sure why others are saying good things because I could not get the avatar to respond to any of the voice prompts or dialogue. Literally the only function that works is that I can move the avatar around the space in ‘mixed reality’. I’m both frustrated and disappointed.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your experience, and we’re sorry for the confusion you encountered.

In most cases like this, the issue is related to microphone permissions. Xiora requires microphone access to respond to voice prompts. If microphone permission is not granted at the system level, the avatar will appear but won’t be able to hear or speak, which can make the app feel non-responsive.

Please make sure microphone access is enabled for Xiora in your Meta Quest system settings, then restart the app. Once permission is granted, voice interaction should work normally.

If you continue to experience issues after checking this, feel free to contact us through our website and we’ll be happy to help.

reviews.review_description: The free plan doesn't offer much, but the paid plans include plenty of outfits and options. For those with the time and budget, it can be a great experience.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the thoughtful review. You’re absolutely right that Xiora is best enjoyed by people who like to spend quiet, personal time rather than fast-paced multiplayer experiences.
For users who enjoy customization and longer sessions, the paid plans unlock much more depth, while others are happy simply enjoying the core experience.
We appreciate you sharing an honest perspective that helps others decide if Xiora fits their lifestyle.

reviews.review_description: The paid plan offers a lot of outfits, but i wish the free plan had more options. Still, it's great!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind words. We’re really happy you found the experience realistic and beautiful.
The Free plan is intentionally simple so new users can get a feel for the presence and conversation itself. Many people start there and later unlock more outfits and customization when they want to personalize the experience further.
We appreciate your feedback and hope you continue enjoying Xiora in your own way.
